# HAWK — Cybersecurity for Canadian Small Businesses

HAWK is an attack surface management (ASM) SaaS tool built for Canadian SMBs.

## What HAWK does
- Scans domains for exposed attack surfaces
- Detects lookalike/typosquat domains targeting your brand
- Checks if your business credentials have been breached (HaveIBeenPwned)
- Monitors SPF, DKIM, and DMARC email security records
- Generates compliance-ready PDF security reports

## Pricing
Plans start at $99 CAD/month. Built for small and medium businesses.

## Who it's for
Canadian small businesses, accountants, law firms, dental offices, and any SMB handling sensitive customer data under PIPEDA.

## Company
Built by Hawk Security (securedbyhawk.com). Contact: hello@securedbyhawk.com
